description1.language: Hotel Per La, Autograph Collection, formerly The Nomad Hotel, is a beautifully restored 12-story building located in Downtown Los Angeles at Olive and 7th Street. This historic landmark offers 241 guest rooms, each inspired by Italian design and featuring custom furnishings, luxury linens, minibars, LED televisions, and private bathrooms with shower/tub combinations, designer toiletries, and hair dryers. Amenities include a rooftop pool and bar with panoramic city views, a ground-floor restaurant and bar, a coffee bar, a 24-hour fitness center, complimentary Wi-Fi, concierge services, a 24-hour business center, dry cleaning/laundry services, and a 24-hour front desk. Valet parking is available. Cooked-to-order breakfast is served daily (weekday hours: 7 AM-11 AM; weekend hours: 7 AM-12 PM, fee applies). The hotel is within walking distance of Pershing Square, The Bloc, Orpheum Theatre, Grand Central Market, and other Downtown LA attractions. Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) is approximately 18 km away.

description2.language: The Hotel Per La is a hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.roomDescription: This spacious double room features air conditioning, a seating area, and a private bathroom with a bath and hairdryer. The unit offers 1 bed.

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned studio features a seating area with a sofa, a flat-screen TV, and a private bathroom with a bath or shower, hairdryer, free toiletries, and bathrobes. The unit has 1 bed.

roomType.name: STUDY, KING BED, CITY VIEW
roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned double room features a flat-screen TV, seating area with sofa, city views, and a private bathroom with bath or shower, hairdryer, bathrobes, and free toiletries.

roomType.name: 1 BEDROOM, OLIVE, SUITE, KING BED, CITY VIEW

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This suite offers a living room, separate bedroom, and bathroom with bath or shower and complimentary toiletries. Amenities include air conditioning, a seating area with sofa, flat-screen TV, and city views.

description1.language: The Westin Anaheim Resort, centrally located in Anaheim, offers 618 air-conditioned rooms featuring iPod docking stations and LED televisions. Rooms include pillowtop beds with down comforters and Egyptian cotton sheets, and bathrooms feature bathtubs or showers with rainfall showerheads and complimentary toiletries. Guests can enjoy recreational amenities including a 24-hour health club and an outdoor pool. Dining options include 4 restaurants, such as Tangerine Room, a coffee shop/cafe, and a bar/lounge and poolside bar. 24-hour room service is available. Continental breakfast is offered daily from 6:30 AM to 11:00 AM for a fee. The hotel provides complimentary wireless internet access, concierge services, gift shops/newsstands, a 24-hour business center, dry cleaning/laundry services, and a 24-hour front desk. The hotel has 23 meeting rooms available for events. Self parking is available onsite (subject to charges). The hotel also features a shared lounge, sun terrace, and hot tub. The hotel is located near the Anaheim Convention Center (0.4 miles) and Downtown Disney® District (0.6 miles). The nearest airport is John Wayne Airport (12.7 miles).

description2.language: The Westin Anaheim Resort is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

fullAddress.hotelStreetAddress: 6516 Selma Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90028, United States

description1.language: Located in central Los Angeles, HOLLYWOOD VOLUME, a Tribute Portfolio Hotel, offers a quintessentially California experience with elevated essentials and attention to detail. Guests can enjoy an outdoor pool, a 24-hour fitness center, complimentary wireless internet access, and concierge services. Dining options include a restaurant, tommie Cafe, a coffee shop/cafe, and limited-hour room service. Guests can relax at one of the two bars/lounges. Cooked-to-order breakfasts are available daily (surcharge). The hotel features express check-in/check-out and dry cleaning/laundry services. The hotel is within walking distance of the Hollywood Walk of Fame and Hollywood Boulevard.

description2.language: The HOLLYWOOD VOLUME, a Tribute Portfolio Hotel is a hotel.

hotel.hotelName: HOLLYWOOD VOLUME, a Tribute Portfolio Hotel

fullAddress.hotelStreetAddress: 1100 S Broadway, Los Angeles, CA 90015, United States

description1.language: Located in downtown Los Angeles, the luxury Proper Hotel, a Member of Design Hotels, offers an outdoor pool, a 24-hour fitness center, and complimentary Wi-Fi throughout the property. The hotel features two restaurants, including Caldo Verde, a bar/lounge, and a poolside bar, with 24-hour room service available. Guests can enjoy concierge services, a ballroom, and dry cleaning/laundry services. The hotel also offers a 24-hour front desk and multilingual staff. The 148 guestrooms feature minibars, Smart TVs, pillowtop beds with Frette Italian sheets, and private bathrooms with rainfall showerheads and designer toiletries. Cooked-to-order breakfasts are available daily (surcharge). The hotel is near the Orpheum Theatre, Crypto.com Arena, and the Los Angeles Convention Center.

description2.language: The Downtown LA Proper Hotel is a hotel.

hotel.address: 1100 S Broadway, Los Angeles, CA 90015, United States

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: PREMIER, KING BED

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This 369-square-foot non-smoking room features a separate sitting area, one king-size pillowtop bed with Frette Italian linens, and blackout drapes/curtains. Entertainment options include a 55-inch Smart TV with Netflix and pay movies, and free WiFi. Guests can enjoy 24-hour room service, a minibar (fees may apply), and complimentary bottled water. The private bathroom offers bathrobes and a bathtub or shower with a rainfall showerhead. Additional amenities include climate-controlled heating and air conditioning, a laptop-compatible safe, a free newspaper, and a laptop workspace. For accessibility, a toilet grab bar is available at a height of 33 inches. Housekeeping is available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested and are subject to availability.

roomType.name: DELUXE, QUEEN BED, WITH VIEW

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This 278-square-foot non-smoking room features a separate sitting area, one queen pillowtop bed with Frette Italian linens, blackout drapes/curtains, and climate-controlled heating and air conditioning. Entertainment options include a 55-inch Smart TV with Netflix and pay movies, and free WiFi. A private bathroom offers bathrobes and a bathtub or shower with a rainfall showerhead, and a toilet grab bar (33-inch height). Conveniences include a laptop-compatible safe, laptop workspace, free bottled water, 24-hour room service, and a minibar (fees may apply). Housekeeping is available on request. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability.

roomType.name: DELUXE, QUEEN BED

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This 270-square-foot non-smoking room features a queen bed with Frette Italian linens and a pillowtop mattress, a separate sitting area, and blackout drapes/curtains. Entertainment options include a 55-inch Smart TV with Netflix and pay movies, and free WiFi. Guests can enjoy 24-hour room service, a minibar (fees may apply), and complimentary bottled water. The private bathroom offers bathrobes and a bathtub or shower with a rainfall showerhead. Additional amenities include climate-controlled heating and air conditioning, a laptop-compatible safe, a laptop workspace, a free newspaper, and housekeeping on request. Accessibility features include a toilet grab bar (33 inches high). Connecting/adjoining rooms are available upon request and subject to availability.

roomType.name: DELUXE, QUEEN BED, WITH VIEW, ACCESSIBLE

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This 280-square-foot double room features a queen-size pillowtop bed with Frette Italian linens, a separate sitting area, and city views. Entertainment options include a 55-inch Smart TV with Netflix and pay movies, and free WiFi. The room also offers a minibar (fees may apply), free bottled water, 24-hour room service, a laptop-compatible safe, a laptop workspace, and climate-controlled heating and air conditioning. The private bathroom includes a bathtub or shower with a rainfall showerhead, bathrobes, free toiletries, and a hairdryer. Additional amenities include blackout drapes/curtains and the option to request housekeeping and fresh bed sheets. Non-smoking. Connecting/adjoining rooms are available upon request. Accessibility features include a toilet grab bar height of 33 inches.

roomType.name: DELUXE, KING BED

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This 337-square-foot, non-smoking double room features a king-size pillowtop bed with Frette Italian linens and a separate sitting area. Entertainment options include a 55-inch Smart TV with Netflix and pay movies, and free WiFi. The room also offers a minibar (fees may apply), free bottled water, 24-hour room service, a laptop-compatible safe, a laptop workspace, and climate-controlled heating and air conditioning. The private bathroom includes a bathtub or shower with a rainfall showerhead, bathrobes, free toiletries, a hairdryer, and a toilet grab bar (33 inches high). Blackout drapes/curtains are provided. Housekeeping is available on request. Connecting/adjoining rooms are available upon request and subject to availability.

roomType.name: PREMIER, SUITE

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This suite features a bedroom, a bathroom with a shower and free toiletries, a minibar, a wardrobe, and a flat-screen TV with streaming services. Enjoy city views from this unit. The unit offers 1 bed.

roomType.name: CONNECTING, JUNIOR SUITE, FAMILY, TWIN BEDS

description1.language: Located in the heart of Los Angeles, the historic Los Angeles Athletic Club, founded in 1880, offers 72 guestrooms on the top three floors of its 12-story Beaux Arts building. Guests enjoy access to the athletic club, featuring a state-of-the-art fitness center with an indoor pool, basketball and racquetball courts, and cardio and weight equipment. A full-service spa offers massages and facials. Dining options include Invention Bar/Restaurant and Famous Players, with cooked-to-order breakfasts available for a fee. Additional amenities include co-working spaces, complimentary Wi-Fi, nightly entertainment, a business center, a 24-hour front desk, multilingual staff, wedding services, and a ballroom. Rooms feature pillowtop beds with down comforters and Frette Italian sheets, flat-screen TVs with satellite programming, private bathrooms with complimentary toiletries and hair dryers, and refrigerators. Self-parking is available (subject to charges). The hotel is close to Pershing Square, The Bloc, Orpheum Theatre, Grand Central Market, The Belasco Theater, Santee Alley, The Broad, Good Samaritan Hospital, L.A. Live, Walt Disney Concert Hall, Grammy Museum, Peacock Theater, Dorothy Chandler Pavilion, Crypto.com Arena, and Los Angeles Convention Center.

description2.language: The Los Angeles Athletic Club is a hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: GARDEN, DELUXE, OCEAN VIEW, GROUND FLOOR

roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned suite features a seating area with a sofa, a flat-screen cable TV, and an iPod docking station. It also includes a small fridge and coffee and tea-making facilities.

description1.language: Located in downtown Los Angeles, AC Hotel by Marriott offers air-conditioned rooms with complimentary wireless internet access and cable TV. Guests can enjoy recreational amenities including an outdoor pool, a 24-hour fitness center, and a nightclub. Dining options include 7 restaurants, a coffee shop/cafe, and 4 bars/lounges. Buffet, continental, or American breakfast options are available for a fee. The hotel features a 24-hour front desk, a business center, express check-out, dry cleaning/laundry services, and meeting rooms. Crypto.com Arena and the Los Angeles Convention Center are steps away.

description2.language: The AC Hotel Downtown Los Angeles is a hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

GUEST ROOM, KING BED, SOFA, CORNER

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles' Beverly Grove, Palihotel Melrose offers 32 air-conditioned rooms with minibars, flat-screen televisions, and complimentary Wi-Fi. Rooms feature memory foam beds with down comforters and Egyptian cotton sheets, and private bathrooms with showers, hair dryers, and bathrobes. Guests can enjoy on-site dining at The Hart and the Hunter restaurant, featuring a southern-influenced menu, or relax with cocktails at the Pali Record Club bar. A coffee shop/cafe is also available. The hotel provides a 24-hour front desk, concierge services, dry cleaning/laundry services, and multilingual staff. Recreation options include a fitness center, terrace, and garden. Self-parking is available (subject to charges). The hotel is within a short drive of Melrose Avenue, CBS Television City, The Grove, and other attractions. Babysitting and bicycle hire are available.

description2.language: The Palihotel Melrose is a hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: ROOM, KING BED, CITY VIEW, LARGE
ROOM, KING BED, COURTYARD VIEW, LARGE
DELUXE, KING BED, TERRACE
roomType.roomDescription: This 253-sq-foot, non-smoking, pet-friendly room features city views, one king bed with memory foam mattress, Egyptian cotton linens, and a down duvet. Enjoy free WiFi, a 32-inch flat-screen TV, and a minibar (fees may apply). The private bathroom includes a shower, bathrobes, and a hair dryer. Additional amenities include air conditioning, a safe, a laptop workspace, and daily housekeeping.

roomType.name: STANDARD, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: This 232-sq-foot, non-smoking, pet-friendly room features city and courtyard views, one king bed with memory foam mattress, Egyptian cotton linens, and a down duvet. Enjoy free WiFi, a 32-inch flat-screen TV, and a minibar (fees may apply). The private bathroom includes a shower, bathrobes, and a hair dryer. Additional amenities include air conditioning, a safe, a laptop workspace, and daily housekeeping.

roomType.name: ROOM, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: The double room offers a safe deposit box and includes one bed.

roomType.name: Suite
roomType.roomDescription: The suite includes a desk and a seating area.

description1.language: Located in the heart of Beverly Hills and within walking distance of Rodeo Drive, Avalon Hotel Beverly Hills, a Member of Design Hotels, is a smoke-free boutique hotel offering 84 non-smoking guest rooms with a vintage style reflecting its old Hollywood roots and a 1950s influence. Each room features a tablet computer, flat-screen cable TV, iPod docking station, a pillowtop bed with down comforters and Frette Italian sheets, a private bathroom with shower/tub combination, designer toiletries, and a hair dryer. Complimentary wired internet access is available. Select rooms may include a minibar, separate living room, balcony/terrace, air conditioning, coffee/tea maker, and bathrobes. Guests can enjoy international cuisine at Viviane, the poolside restaurant and bar/lounge, with room service available during limited hours. Cooked-to-order breakfast is offered daily from 7 AM to 11 AM for a fee. The hotel features a boomerang-shaped outdoor pool with a furnished pool deck and private cabanas, as well as a poolside bar. A 24-hour fitness center is available with cardio equipment. Bicycle rentals are also offered. Additional amenities include concierge services, a banquet hall, a business center, limo/town car service, free Wi-Fi access, luggage storage, safety deposit boxes, dry cleaning, and laundry service. The hotel provides 400 square feet of conference/meeting space. Nearby attractions include Rodeo Drive, Westfield Century City, and Wilshire Boulevard. Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) is approximately 16.5 miles away.

description2.language: The Avalon Hotel Beverly Hills is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: Junior Suite

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This 450-square-foot non-smoking room features a king bed with pillowtop mattress, Frette Italian linens, and a down duvet. A separate sitting area enhances the space. Enjoy entertainment options including a 42-inch HDTV with premium channels, pay movies, and a tablet computer. Free wired internet is provided. The room also offers a minibar (fees may apply) and limited room service. The private bathroom includes a shower/tub combination, bathrobes, and slippers. Additional amenities include a safe, iron/ironing board, laptop workspace, climate-controlled heating and air conditioning, and daily housekeeping. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Accessibility features include a height-adjustable showerhead. In-room massage is available. The room is accessed via exterior corridors. Housekeeping is available on request.

roomType.name: DELUXE, KING BED

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This 330-square-foot non-smoking room features a king bed with a pillowtop mattress, Frette Italian linens, and a down duvet. Enjoy entertainment options including a 42-inch HDTV with premium channels, pay movies, and a tablet computer. Stay connected with free wired internet access. The room also offers a minibar (fees may apply), room service (limited), a safe, iron/ironing board, and a laptop workspace. The private bathroom includes a shower/tub combination, bathrobes, slippers, and a height-adjustable showerhead. Climate-controlled heating and air conditioning, daily housekeeping, and in-room massage services are available. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Housekeeping is available on request. The room is accessed via exterior corridors. Toothbrushes and toothpaste are not available.

roomType.name: STANDARD, DOUBLE BED, PARTIAL OCEAN VIEW
Penthouse
roomType.roomDescription: Located on the top floor of the Beverly Tower, this suite features a bedroom with a king bed and a living room with a full Murphy bed. It includes a rooftop deck with a dining table and lounge chairs, Italian designer linens, en suite bathrooms, and a separate living space with a flat-screen HD TV, wet bar, and dining table with two-line speakerphone conference capability.

roomType.name: Junior Suite, Balcony
roomType.roomDescription: The unit offers 1 bed.

roomType.name: Junior Suite, Accessible

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This 450-square-foot non-smoking room features a king bed with pillowtop mattress, Frette Italian linens, and a down duvet, as well as a separate sitting area. Enjoy entertainment options including a 42-inch HDTV with premium channels, pay movies, and a tablet computer. Free wired internet access is provided. The private bathroom offers a shower/tub combination, bathrobes, and slippers. Additional amenities include climate-controlled heating and air conditioning, a safe, iron/ironing board, and a laptop workspace. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. In-room massage is available. Room service (limited) and a minibar (fees may apply) are offered. Housekeeping is provided daily, with service available on request. The room is accessed via exterior corridors and includes a height-adjustable showerhead. Toothbrush and toothpaste are not available.

roomType.name: CLASSIC, KING BED, ACCESSIBLE

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: Located in an annex building, this 350-sq-ft non-smoking room features one king bed with a pillowtop mattress, Frette Italian linens, and a down duvet. Enjoy entertainment options including a 42-inch HDTV with premium channels, pay movies, and a tablet computer. Free wired internet access is provided. The private bathroom offers a shower/tub combination, bathrobes, slippers, and a height-adjustable showerhead. Additional amenities include climate-controlled heating and air conditioning, a safe, iron/ironing board, and a laptop workspace. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Relax with available in-room massage. Room service (limited) and a minibar (fees may apply) are offered. Daily housekeeping is provided, with housekeeping available on request. The room is accessed via exterior corridors. Toothbrush and toothpaste are not available.

description1.language: Located in the heart of Los Angeles, the Beverly Hills Marriott is near the Museum of Tolerance, Rodeo Drive, and 20th Century Fox Studios. It offers 260 air-conditioned rooms featuring pillowtop beds with premium bedding, LCD televisions with cable programming, refrigerators, and private bathrooms with complimentary toiletries and hair dryers. Guests can enjoy an outdoor pool, hot tub, and fitness center, as well as complimentary Wi-Fi, concierge services, wedding services, a business center, and limo/town car service. Dining options include the Great Room Restaurant &amp; L, room service (during limited hours), and to-go breakfasts available for a fee. The preferred airport is Los Angeles International Airport (LAX).

description2.language: The Beverly Hills Marriott is a Business, City hotel, Full Service, Honeymoon, Leisure, Resort, Tourist, Traditional hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

ROOM, KING BED, ACCESSIBLE
roomType.roomDescription: This 312-square-foot non-smoking room features a king-size pillowtop bed with premium bedding, free WiFi, and an LCD TV with premium channels. A private bathroom offers a shower, hairdryer, and complimentary toiletries. Conveniences include a refrigerator, coffee/tea maker, safe, iron/ironing board, and laptop workspace. Air conditioning, a visual fire alarm, energy-saving switches, and a recycling bin are also provided. Housekeeping and fresh towels/bed sheets are available on request. Cribs/infant beds can be requested for free, but rollaway/extra beds are not available. Connecting/adjoining rooms are subject to availability.

roomType.name: EXECUTIVE, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking room features one king-size pillowtop bed with premium bedding, complimentary WiFi, and an LCD TV with premium channels. A private bathroom offers a shower, hairdryer, and free toiletries. Conveniences include a refrigerator, coffee/tea maker, safe, iron/ironing board, laptop workspace, and air conditioning. Rollaway/extra beds and cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Eco-friendly features include energy-saving switches and a recycling bin. Housekeeping, fresh bed sheets, and fresh towels are available on request. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability. Accessibility features include closed-captioned TV.

roomType.name: PURE, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking room features one king-size pillowtop bed with premium bedding, complimentary WiFi, and an LCD TV with premium channels. A private bathroom offers a shower, hairdryer, and free toiletries. Conveniences include a refrigerator, coffee/tea maker, safe, iron/ironing board, laptop workspace, and air conditioning. Rollaway/extra beds and cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Eco-friendly features include energy-saving switches and a recycling bin. Housekeeping, fresh bed sheets, and fresh towels are available on request. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability. Accessibility features include closed-captioned TV.

roomType.name: 1 BEDROOM, 2 ROOMS, SUITE, KING BED, CITY VIEW, SOFA, CLUB LOUNGE ACCESS

description1.language: Located in the heart of Los Angeles, Burton House, Beverly Hills, A Tribute Portfolio Hotel, is within a 10-minute drive of UCLA and the Hollywood Walk of Fame. It offers 186 guestrooms, each featuring a kitchen with a full-sized refrigerator/freezer, stovetop, and microwave. Guests can enjoy a 49-inch or 55-inch flat-screen Smart TV with cable programming and complimentary Wi-Fi. The hotel features a 24-hour fitness center, Emerald Lounge Restaurant specializing in Californian cuisine, a bar/lounge, and a coffee shop/cafe. Meeting rooms and conference space are available. Amenities include concierge services, express check-out, dry cleaning/laundry services, and a 24-hour front desk. Self-parking is available onsite (subject to charges).

description2.language: The Burton House, Beverly Hills, A Tribute Portfolio Hotel is a Tourist hotel. Located in Beverly Hills area. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

hotel.hotelName: Burton House, Beverly Hills, A Tribute Portfolio Hotel

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: DELUXE, STUDIO, QUEEN BED
roomType.roomDescription: This 440-square-foot non-smoking room features one queen bed, free WiFi (50+ Mbps), and a 55-inch flat-screen TV with premium channels and Netflix. A mini-fridge, microwave, and coffee/tea maker are provided. The private bathroom includes a bathtub or shower, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. Additional amenities include a double sofa bed, safe, climate-controlled air conditioning, hypo-allergenic bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, and hardwood flooring. Cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Fresh bed sheets and towels are available on request. Free local calls are included.

roomType.name: INTERIOR, SIGNATURE, SUITE, PRIVATE POOL, JETTED TUB
1 BEDROOM, EXECUTIVE, SUITE, KING BED

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This suite features a kitchenette with a refrigerator and microwave, a tea and coffee maker, a seating area, a dining area, and a wardrobe. Entertainment is provided by a flat-screen TV with cable channels. The private bathroom includes a shower and complimentary toiletries. The unit has 2 beds.

roomType.name: 2 BEDROOMS, SUITE

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking room features free WiFi (50+ Mbps), a 55-inch flat-screen TV with premium channels and Netflix, and climate-controlled air conditioning. It includes a mini-fridge, microwave, coffee/tea maker, and a safe. The private bathroom offers a bathtub or shower, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. Guests can enjoy hypo-allergenic bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, and hardwood flooring. Fresh bed sheets and towels are available on request. A double sofa bed, free local calls, iron/ironing board, laptop workspace and free cribs/infant beds (on request) are also available.

description1.language: Located in downtown Los Angeles, The Delphi Hotel is near the Financial District, Pershing Square, and Walt Disney Concert Hall. It offers complimentary wireless internet access, a 24-hour fitness center, and a banquet hall. Guests can dine at Denae's Diner, specializing in American cuisine, or grab snacks at the coffee shop/cafe. Cooked-to-order breakfasts are available daily for a fee. The hotel features dry cleaning/laundry services, a 24-hour front desk, and multilingual staff. It also offers conference space and meeting rooms. The 207 guestrooms include iPod docking stations, flat-screen televisions, cable programming, phones, safes, and desks. Partially open bathrooms feature bathtubs or showers, designer toiletries, and hair dryers. The Delphi Hotel Lounge is open daily, serving coffees, teas, and cocktails. Guests can enjoy an outdoor lounge and fire pit. Registered guests must be at least 21 years of age. Early departures will be charged a one-night penalty.

description2.language: The Delphi Hotel Los Angeles is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: DELUXE, KING BED

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking room features a king bed with premium bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, and climate-controlled air conditioning. Entertainment options include a flat-screen TV with premium channels and pay movies, and free WiFi is provided. The private bathroom offers a bathtub or shower, bathrobes, and designer toiletries. A safe, iron/ironing board, and laptop workspace are included for convenience. A refrigerator and rollaway/extra beds are available on request. Limited housekeeping service is provided.

roomType.name: DELPHI, PENTHOUSE, SUITE, KING BED, ACCESSIBLE

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking room features a king bed, free WiFi, and a flat-screen TV with premium channels and pay movies. A refrigerator is available on request. Enjoy premium bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, climate-controlled air conditioning, and a partially open bathroom with a bathtub or shower, bathrobes, and designer toiletries. Practical amenities include a safe, iron/ironing board, and laptop workspace. Rollaway/extra beds are available on request. Limited housekeeping service is provided.

roomType.name: SUPERIOR, KING BED

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking room features a king bed with premium bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, and climate-controlled air conditioning. Entertainment options include a flat-screen TV with premium channels and pay movies, and free WiFi. The private bathroom offers a bathtub or shower, bathrobes, and designer toiletries. Additional amenities include a safe, iron/ironing board, and laptop workspace. A refrigerator and rollaway/extra beds are available on request. Limited housekeeping service is provided.

roomType.name: CLASSIC, KING BED

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This room features a king bed, free WiFi, and a flat-screen TV with premium channels and pay movies. A refrigerator is available on request. Guests can enjoy premium bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, a partially open bathroom with a bathtub or shower, bathrobes, and designer toiletries. Additional amenities include a safe, iron/ironing board, laptop workspace, and climate-controlled air conditioning. Rollaway/extra beds are available on request. Limited housekeeping is provided. Non-Smoking.

roomType.name: SELECT, QUEEN BED

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking room features one queen bed, free WiFi, a flat-screen TV with premium channels and pay movies, and climate-controlled air conditioning. The partially open bathroom includes a bathtub or shower, bathrobes, and designer toiletries. For your convenience, a safe, iron/ironing board, and laptop workspace are provided. Premium bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, and bed sheets ensure a comfortable sleep. A refrigerator and rollaway/extra beds are available upon request. Limited housekeeping service is provided.

roomType.name: DELPHI, SUITE, ACCESSIBLE

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This spacious, non-smoking corner room features high-speed WiFi and tall windows providing ample natural light. It includes a king bed, seating area, walk-in closets, and a work desk. The partially open bathroom offers a bathtub or shower, bathrobes, and designer toiletries. Additional amenities include a flat-screen TV with premium channels and pay movies, premium bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, a safe, iron/ironing board, and climate-controlled air conditioning. A refrigerator and rollaway/extra beds are available on request. Limited housekeeping service is provided.

roomType.name: DELPHI, PENTHOUSE, SUITE
roomType.roomDescription: The unit has 1 bed.

roomType.name: DELPHI, SUITE, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: The unit has 1 bed.

description1.language: Located in the heart of Los Angeles, Stillwell Hotel offers 232 air-conditioned rooms featuring refrigerators and flat-screen televisions. Complimentary wireless internet access and cable programming are available. Private bathrooms offer shower/tub combinations, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Microwaves and irons/ironing boards are available on request, and housekeeping is provided on a limited basis. The hotel features a restaurant, coffee shop/cafe, and a bar/lounge. Guests can enjoy amenities such as bicycles to rent and a vending machine. Additional amenities include a 24-hour front desk, multilingual staff, and ATM/banking services. Self-parking is available onsite (subject to charges). Nearby attractions include The Bloc, Orpheum Theatre, L.A. Live, and Crypto.com Arena. The preferred airport is Los Angeles Intl. (LAX).

description2.language: The Stillwell Hotel is a hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

description1.language: Located in downtown Los Angeles, STILE Downtown Los Angeles by Kasa offers 182 guestrooms with flat-screen TVs, iPod docking stations, and complimentary wireless internet access. Bathrooms include complimentary toiletries and hair dryers. Conveniences include safes and desks, and housekeeping is provided on request. The hotel features an outdoor pool, fitness center, 24-hour business center, concierge services, and a ballroom. Express check-in/check-out and luggage storage are available. The hotel is located near the Orpheum Theatre, The Belasco Theater, Pershing Square, and L.A. Live. It is a short drive from the University of Southern California and California State University-Los Angeles. The hotel is smoke-free and has a bar.

description2.language: The STILE Downtown Los Angeles by Kasa is a hotel.

hotel.hotelName: STILE Downtown Los Angeles by Kasa

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: PRESIDENTIAL, LOFT, SUITE, KING BED, TERRACE
LOFT, SUITE, KING OR QUEEN BED, WITH EXTRA BED
STANDARD, QUEEN BED
roomType.roomDescription: This soundproofed, non-smoking room features one queen bed, climate-controlled air conditioning, and free WiFi (250+ Mbps, good for 3–5 people or up to 10 devices). Entertainment options include a 30-inch flat-screen TV with cable channels and an iPod dock. The room also provides an electric kettle, a safe, a desk, and a wardrobe or closet. Guests can enjoy premium bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, and a bathroom with a bathtub or shower, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. Housekeeping is available on request. Please note that rollaway/extra beds, toothbrushes, and toothpaste are not available.

roomType.name: PRESIDENTIAL, SUITE

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned suite features a private entrance, a living room, a separate bedroom, and a bathroom with a bath and shower. The spacious suite includes a kitchenette with a refrigerator and kitchenware, a seating area with a flat-screen TV, a tea and coffee maker, and a terrace. Enjoy the pool with a view.

roomType.name: PREMIER, STUDIO, SUITE
roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking room features a king bed, city views, and climate-controlled air conditioning. Enjoy free WiFi (250+ Mbps, good for 3–5 people or up to 10 devices), a 30-inch flat-screen TV with cable channels, and an iPod dock. The room also includes a mini-fridge, electric kettle, safe, desk, wardrobe or closet, premium bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, and a bathroom with a bathtub or shower, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. Housekeeping is available on request. Rollaway/extra beds, toothbrushes, and toothpaste are not available.

roomType.name: CLASSIC, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: This soundproofed, non-smoking room features 1 king bed, climate-controlled air conditioning, and free WiFi (250+ Mbps). Entertainment options include a 30-inch flat-screen TV with cable channels and an iPod dock. Guests can enjoy the convenience of an electric kettle, a safe, a desk, and a wardrobe or closet. The bathroom offers a bathtub or shower, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. Additional amenities include premium bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, and housekeeping on request. Please note that rollaway/extra beds, toothbrushes, and toothpaste are not available.

roomType.name: SUITE, KING BED

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned suite features a private entrance, a living room, a separate bedroom, and a bathroom with a bath and shower. Amenities include carpeted floors, a seating area with a flat-screen TV, a tea and coffee maker, a wardrobe, and a safe deposit box. The suite also offers a pool with a view.

roomType.name: PRESIDENTIAL, STUDIO, SUITE, TERRACE
roomType.roomDescription: This soundproofed, non-smoking room features a king bed, climate-controlled air conditioning, and free WiFi (250+ Mbps, good for 3–5 people or up to 10 devices). Entertainment options include a 30-inch flat-screen TV with cable channels and an iPod dock. A mini-fridge and electric kettle are provided. The bathroom has a bathtub or shower, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. Additional amenities include premium bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, a safe, desk, and wardrobe or closet. Housekeeping is available on request. Toothbrushes, toothpaste, cribs, and rollaway beds are not available.

roomType.roomDescription: This soundproofed, non-smoking room features 1 king bed, climate-controlled air conditioning, and free WiFi (250+ Mbps). Entertainment options include a 30-inch flat-screen TV with cable channels and an iPod dock. Guests can enjoy the convenience of an electric kettle, a safe, a desk, and a wardrobe or closet. The bathroom offers a bathtub or shower, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. Additional amenities include premium bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, and housekeeping on request. Please note that rollaway/extra beds, toothbrushes, and toothpaste are not available.

roomType.name: ROOM, KING BED

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned studio features a pool with a view, a private entrance, and a private bathroom with a walk-in shower and hairdryer. The unit offers 1 bed.

roomType.name: ROOM, QUEEN BED

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned studio features a pool with a view, a private entrance, carpeted floors, a seating area with a flat-screen TV, a tea and coffee maker, a wardrobe, and a safe deposit box. The private bathroom has a walk-in shower and a hairdryer. The unit offers 1 bed.

roomType.name: ROOM, KING BED, ACCESSIBLE

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This wheelchair-accessible studio features a private entrance, air conditioning, a seating area with a flat-screen TV, and a tea and coffee maker. The private bathroom includes a walk-in shower, a roll-in shower, and a hairdryer. Guests can enjoy a pool with a view. The unit offers 1 bed.

roomType.name: ROOM, KING BED, BALCONY

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned studio features a pool with a view, a private entrance, and a terrace with city views. It includes a private bathroom with a bath and 1 bed.

roomType.name: TRADITIONAL, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: This soundproofed, wheelchair-accessible room features one king bed, climate-controlled air conditioning, and free WiFi (250+ Mbps, good for 3–5 people or up to 10 devices). Entertainment options include a 30-inch flat-screen TV with cable channels and an iPod dock. The room also provides an electric kettle, a safe, a desk, and a wardrobe or closet. The bathroom has a bathtub or shower, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. Additional amenities include premium bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, and housekeeping on request. This is a non-smoking room; toothbrush and toothpaste, cribs, and rollaway/extra beds are not available.

description1.language: Enjoy a comfortable stay at the Holiday Inn Express West Los Angeles, conveniently located off the 405 Freeway, a short drive from LAX, and near UCLA and Santa Monica. The hotel offers modern rooms with complimentary Wi-Fi, a flat-screen TV with cable, a microwave, a refrigerator, a safe, a desk, and a private bathroom with a shower/tub combination and hairdryer. Guests can enjoy a free hot breakfast buffet daily and utilize the 24-hour fitness center and business center. Additional amenities include a 24-hour front desk, express check-in, a rooftop terrace, a television in a common area, and a vending machine. Self-parking is available (subject to charges). The hotel is centrally located near attractions like UCLA, Westwood Village, and Rodeo Drive.

description2.language: The Holiday Inn Express West Los Angeles is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

hotel.hotelName: Holiday Inn Express West Los Angeles

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: STANDARD, KING BED

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking room features climate-controlled air conditioning, heating, and is accessed via exterior corridors. It includes free WiFi, a 55-inch LED TV with premium channels and pay movies, a refrigerator, microwave, coffee/tea maker, a safe, iron/ironing board, and a private bathroom with a shower/tub combination, hair dryer, and towels. A free weekday newspaper and daily housekeeping are provided. Free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability. No rollaway/extra beds are available.

roomType.name: STANDARD, QUEEN BED

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This 248-square-foot non-smoking room features one queen bed, free WiFi, and a 55-inch LED TV with premium channels and pay movies. A refrigerator, microwave, and coffee/tea maker are provided. The private bathroom has a shower/tub combination, a hair dryer, and towels. Additional amenities include climate-controlled air conditioning, heating, daily housekeeping, a safe, free weekday newspaper, and an iron/ironing board. Free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Room is accessed via exterior corridors. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability.

roomType.name: STANDARD, QUEEN BED, ACCESSIBLE

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking room features one queen bed, free WiFi, and a 55-inch LED TV with premium channels and pay movies. A refrigerator, microwave, and coffee/tea maker are provided. The private bathroom includes a bathtub or shower, hairdryer, and towels. Additional amenities include climate-controlled air conditioning, heating, a safe, free weekday newspaper, iron/ironing board, and daily housekeeping. Free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Accessible bathtub or roll-in shower available. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability. Room is accessed via exterior corridors.

roomType.name: Standard

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This room features a choice of one king or one queen bed, free WiFi, and a 55-inch LED TV with premium channels and pay movies. A refrigerator, microwave, and coffee/tea maker are provided. The private bathroom includes a shower/tub combination, hairdryer, and towels. Additional amenities include climate-controlled air conditioning and heating, a safe, iron/ironing board, and daily housekeeping. Cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Non-smoking. Room is accessed via exterior corridors. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability. No rollaway/extra beds available.

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles' Beverly Grove neighborhood, Short Stories Hotel offers 66 air-conditioned rooms with minibars, Smart TVs, pillowtop beds with down comforters and Egyptian cotton sheets, and private bathrooms with rainfall showerheads and designer toiletries. Guests can enjoy complimentary wireless internet access and cable programming. The hotel features an outdoor pool, terrace, garden, concierge services, discounted access to a nearby fitness facility, express check-out, dry cleaning/laundry services, and a 24-hour front desk. Dining is available at The Bar at Short Stories, specializing in American cuisine, with room service offered during limited hours. The hotel is within walking distance of Farmers Market and The Grove, and a short distance from CBS Television City and the Los Angeles County Museum of Art.

description2.language: The Short Stories Hotel is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

fullAddress.hotelStreetAddress: 888 S. Olive St. Los Angeles, CA

description1.language: Level Los Angeles Downtown - South Olive offers 303 individually furnished suites in the heart of Downtown Los Angeles' South Park District, a 30-minute drive from LAX. The hotel is within a 10-minute walk of L.A. Live, Staples Center, Grand Park, and numerous restaurants. Nearby attractions include the Fashion Institute of Design &amp; Merchandising, Orpheum Theatre, The Bloc, and Pershing Square. Amenities include a 37,000 sq. ft. indoor/outdoor space with a rooftop pool (Downtown LA's largest outdoor rooftop pool), a lounge with BBQs and fire pits, a rooftop basketball court, poolside cabanas, a dry sauna, a hot tub, and a 24/7 gym. Each suite features a fully equipped kitchen (full-sized refrigerator/freezer, oven), a private furnished balcony or patio, a 50&quot; flat-screen cable TV, and free Wi-Fi. Additional amenities include a 24-hour business center, concierge service, dry cleaning/laundry services, a 24-hour front desk, and 10 meeting rooms. A coffee shop/cafe and Sakana Sushi Bar are located on-site. Parking is available.

description2.language: The Level Los Angeles Downtown South Olive is a hotel.

hotel.hotelName: Level Los Angeles Downtown South Olive
hotel.address: 888 S. Olive St. Los Angeles, CA

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: 2 BEDROOMS, SUITE
roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned suite includes two bedrooms, two bathrooms, a living room with seating area, a kitchen with microwave, tea and coffee maker, and a balcony.

roomType.name: 1 BEDROOM, SUITE
roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned suite includes a bedroom, bathroom, living room with seating area, and kitchen with microwave. Tea and coffee making facilities and a balcony are provided. The suite has two beds.

roomType.name: JIMMY B BEACH BAR, PATIO, ACCESSIBLE

fullAddress.hotelStreetAddress: 8384 West Third Street (8384 W 3rd St, Los Angeles, CA 90048, United States)

description1.language: Palihouse West Hollywood at Beverly Hills offers 95 guestrooms with minibars, LCD televisions, pillowtop beds with Egyptian cotton sheets, private bathrooms featuring bathtubs or showers, designer toiletries, and hair dryers. Complimentary Wi-Fi is available throughout the hotel. The hotel features a 24-hour front desk, concierge services, a business center, dry cleaning/laundry services, a 24-hour fitness center with Peloton bikes, an outdoor saltwater pool, and a Pool Lounge. Onsite massages and facials are available. Mediterranean cuisine is served at the Palihouse Lobby Lounge, which includes a bar/lounge. Room service is available during limited hours, and buffet breakfasts are offered daily (7 AM-11 AM, fee applies). The hotel offers 6000 square feet of event space with conference space and two meeting rooms. It is conveniently located near Beverly Center Shopping Mall, Cedars-Sinai Medical Center, Wilshire Boulevard, and many other attractions (distances provided in miles and kilometers). The hotel is pet-friendly. Nearby airports include Hollywood Burbank (BUR), Los Angeles International (LAX), Hawthorne (HHR), Van Nuys (VNY), and Long Beach Municipal (LGB) airports (distances provided in miles and kilometers).

description2.language: The Palihouse West Hollywood is a Tourist hotel. Located in Los Angeles area. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

hotel.address: 8384 West Third Street (8384 W 3rd St, Los Angeles, CA 90048, United States)

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: DELUXE, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: This double room includes a tea and coffee maker and a safe deposit box.

roomType.name: DELUXE, DOUBLE BED, BALCONY
roomType.roomDescription: This quadruple room includes a tea and coffee maker and a safe deposit box. It offers two beds.

roomType.name: ROOM, KING BED, ACCESSIBLE
roomType.roomDescription: This double room includes a tea and coffee maker and a safe deposit box. It has one bed.

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles' Beverly Grove, near the Beverly Center Shopping Mall, Elan Hotel offers 49 guestrooms with complimentary wired and wireless internet access, flat-screen televisions with cable programming, and iPod docking stations. Rooms also feature pillowtop beds with premium bedding, refrigerators, and private bathrooms with shower/tub combinations, designer toiletries, and hair dryers. The hotel features a 24-hour reception, concierge services, a business center, and meeting facilities. Express check-in/check-out, luggage storage, safety deposit boxes, and car hire are available. Onsite self-parking is available (subject to charges). Guests can enjoy the fitness center and massage services. The hotel is undergoing renovations from May 28, 2025, to June 21, 2025, affecting the hallway, meeting facilities, and select guestrooms, with work conducted during business hours to minimize disturbance. Smoking is prohibited throughout the hotel.

description2.language: The Elan Hotel Los Angeles is a hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: All New Executive One King Room - Executive One King Room-Comp WIFI-Spa bathrobes-Coffee maker-Safe-Iron-Mini refrigerator
EXECUTIVE, KING BED

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking room features a pillowtop bed with premium bedding, climate-controlled air conditioning, and daily housekeeping. Entertainment options include a flat-screen TV with premium channels and an iPod dock. Guests can enjoy complimentary WiFi and wired internet access, a refrigerator, and a coffee/tea maker. The private bathroom offers a shower/tub combination, bathrobes, and designer toiletries. Additional amenities include a laptop-compatible safe, desk, iron/ironing board, and a grab bar in the bathtub. Bed sheets are not available.

description1.language: The Holiday Inn Express Los Angeles Airport offers a convenient location near LAX airport, with a complimentary 24-hour airport shuttle. Guests can enjoy a complimentary breakfast buffet, an outdoor pool, and a 24-hour fitness center. The hotel features complimentary Wi-Fi, a business center, and a 24-hour front desk. The hotel is close to attractions like Loyola Marymount University, SoFi Stadium, and Venice Beach. Guest rooms feature air conditioning, LCD televisions with cable programming, a desk, a safe, and a private bathroom with complimentary toiletries and a hair dryer.

description2.language: The HOLIDAY INN EXPRESS LOS ANGELES-LAX AIRPORT is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

hotel.hotelName: HOLIDAY INN EXPRESS LOS ANGELES-LAX AIRPORT

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

Guests can enjoy tea- and coffee-making facilities, a laptop workspace, a safe, and an iron/ironing board. The private bathroom includes a shower/tub combination, complimentary toiletries, and a hairdryer. Additional amenities include air conditioning, daily housekeeping, and bed sheets.

SUITE, KING BED, ACCESSIBLE
roomType.roomDescription: This soundproofed, wheelchair-accessible suite features a king bed, flat-screen LCD TV with premium channels, free WiFi, a coffee/tea maker, and a laptop workspace. The private bathroom offers a shower/tub combination, complimentary toiletries, and a hairdryer. Additional amenities include air conditioning, a safe, iron/ironing board, daily housekeeping, and bed sheets. Non-smoking.

roomType.roomDescription: This room features a flat-screen TV, a bathroom with grab bars, and tea- and coffee-making facilities.

roomType.name: Standard
roomType.roomDescription: This soundproofed, non-smoking room features a choice of one double or one queen bed, depending on availability at check-in. Amenities include free WiFi, an LCD TV with premium channels, a coffee/tea maker, air conditioning, a safe, an iron/ironing board, and a laptop workspace. The private bathroom offers a shower/tub combination, complimentary toiletries, and a hairdryer. Daily housekeeping is provided.

roomType.roomDescription: This room features a flat-screen TV and tea- and coffee-making facilities.

roomType.name: SUITE, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: This soundproofed, non-smoking room features a king bed, free WiFi, and an LCD TV with premium channels. Guests can enjoy the convenience of a coffee/tea maker, a laptop workspace, and air conditioning. The private bathroom includes a shower/tub combination, complimentary toiletries, and a hair dryer. Additional amenities include a safe, iron/ironing board, and daily housekeeping.

description1.language: Located on Sunset Boulevard in Hollywood, the Sunset West Hotel, SureStay Collection By Best Western, offers convenient access to attractions such as the Hollywood Walk of Fame and TCL Chinese Theatre. The hotel features a heated outdoor pool, a 24-hour front desk, luggage storage, and complimentary Wi-Fi in public areas. Guests can enjoy a complimentary continental breakfast daily from 7:00 AM to 10:00 AM. The air-conditioned rooms include a refrigerator, microwave, coffee maker, hairdryer, and a flat-screen TV with cable programming. Free self-parking is available.

description2.language: The Sunset West Hotel, SureStay Collection by Best Western is a hotel.

hotel.hotelName: Sunset West Hotel, SureStay Collection by Best Western

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

description1.language: Located in Burbank, the Safari Inn, a Coast Hotel, offers convenient access to nearby attractions including Warner Bros. Studios and Universal Studios Hollywood. The hotel features complimentary WiFi, parking, and a 24-hour front desk. Guests can enjoy an outdoor pool, a fitness center, and a sundeck. A complimentary shuttle service is available to Burbank Airport and within Burbank with advance reservations. The hotel offers 55 air-conditioned guest rooms with flat-screen TVs, coffee/tea makers, and private bathrooms with complimentary toiletries. Dining options include a restaurant and a bar/lounge. Full breakfasts are available daily for a fee. Additional amenities include express check-out and dry cleaning/laundry services.

description2.language: The Safari Inn, a Coast Hotel is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

fullAddress.hotelStreetAddress: 10320 West Olympic Boulevard ? Los Angeles, California 90064 USA

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles (Century City), the hotel is near Westfield Century City mall and Beverly Hills, and a short drive from Rodeo Drive and Westwood Village. It offers 136 air-conditioned rooms featuring refrigerators, microwaves, pillowtop beds with premium bedding, 32-inch flat-screen TVs with cable programming, and complimentary wireless internet access. Bathrooms include complimentary toiletries and hair dryers. Guests can dine at The Bistro, which offers a bar/lounge and alfresco dining, and serves full breakfasts daily for a fee. A coffee shop/cafe and a 24-hour convenience store are also available. Amenities include complimentary wireless internet access, a 24-hour fitness center, and a hot tub. The hotel provides a business center, express check-out, and complimentary newspapers in the lobby. Conference space and a meeting room are available for events. Self-parking is available for a fee. Swimming is available within 7 miles.

description2.language: The COURTYARD LOS ANGELES CENTURY CITY BEVERLY HILLS is a Tourist hotel. Located in Los Angeles area. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

hotel.hotelName: COURTYARD LOS ANGELES CENTURY CITY BEVERLY HILLS
hotel.address: 10320 West Olympic Boulevard ? Los Angeles, California 90064 USA

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles, Le Petit Pali Brentwood offers accommodation with a garden and free private parking. It is centrally located within a 5-minute drive of the Getty Center and close to the University of California Los Angeles and Santa Monica Beach. The hotel features complimentary wired and wireless internet access, concierge services, a fireplace in the lobby, and a 24-hour front desk. Guests can enjoy a complimentary continental breakfast daily. The air-conditioned rooms are individually furnished and feature refrigerators, minibars, LCD televisions with cable programming, coffee/tea makers, and phones with free local calls. Private bathrooms include showers, designer toiletries, and hair dryers. Free bikes are available. Los Angeles International Airport is nearby.

description2.language: The Le Petit Pali Brentwood is a hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: ROOM, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: This 218-square-foot, non-smoking double room features courtyard views, a king-size bed with Frette Italian linens, a pillow menu, and air conditioning. Entertainment options include a 50-inch LCD TV with premium channels and streaming services, as well as free WiFi and wired internet access. Guests can enjoy a private entrance, a mini-fridge, minibar (fees may apply), espresso maker, free bottled water, and complimentary chocolate. The private bathroom has a walk-in shower with a rainfall showerhead, bathrobes, slippers, a hairdryer, and free toiletries. Additional amenities include a safe, iron/ironing board, phone, daily housekeeping, heating, and hardwood flooring. The room is accessed via exterior corridors. Connecting/adjoining rooms are available upon request.

fullAddress.hotelStreetAddress: 225 North Canon Drive, Beverly Hills, CA

description1.language: Located in the heart of Beverly Hills, The Maybourne Beverly Hills offers 203 individually decorated guestrooms featuring minibars, LCD TVs, pillowtop beds with down comforters and Egyptian cotton sheets, complimentary wireless internet access, and digital programming. Private bathrooms include separate bathtubs and showers with deep soaking bathtubs and rainfall showerheads, as well as Frette bathrobes and slippers. Guests can enjoy Californian cuisine at one of the 2 restaurants, relax at the coffee shop/cafe or one of the 2 bars/lounges, and take advantage of 24-hour room service. Cooked-to-order breakfasts are available for a fee. The hotel boasts a spa offering massages, body treatments, and facials, along with 2 hot tubs, a sauna, a 24-hour fitness center, and a rooftop pool with a sun terrace. Additional amenities include complimentary wireless internet access, concierge services, a 24-hour front desk, limo/town car service, dry cleaning/laundry services, a complimentary area shuttle (within 3 miles), and an airport shuttle (surcharge). The hotel also offers gift shops/newsstands, 7 meeting rooms, taxi and shuttle services, luggage storage, express check-in/check-out, and safety deposit boxes. This is a non-smoking property.

description2.language: The Maybourne Beverly Hills is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are easily accessible by taxi or bus from the hotel.

hotel.address: 225 North Canon Drive, Beverly Hills, CA

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

airport.name: Los Angeles International Airport
airport.directions: via Wilshire Blvd and I-405 S

roomType.name: STUDIO, DOUBLE OR TWIN BED, TERRACE
GARDEN SUITE, DOUBLE OR TWIN BED
JUNIOR SUITE, DOUBLE OR TWIN BED, TERRACE
ROOM, DOUBLE OR TWIN BED, TERRACE

ROOM, DOUBLE OR TWIN BED, BALCONY
SUITE, DOUBLE OR TWIN BED, TERRACE
STUDIO, SUITE, DOUBLE OR TWIN BED, TERRACE
SUPERIOR, ACCESSIBLE
roomType.roomDescription: This 435-square-foot room features a king bed with pillowtop mattress, Egyptian cotton linens, a down duvet, and turndown service. Enjoy entertainment with a 55-inch LCD TV, digital channels, and Netflix, as well as free WiFi. The room also includes a mini-fridge, minibar with some complimentary items, 24-hour room service, and free bottled water. The private bathroom offers a deep soaking bathtub and separate shower with a rainfall showerhead. Additional amenities include air conditioning, heating, a safe, free newspaper, laptop workspace, and daily housekeeping. Free rollaway/extra beds and cribs/infant beds are available upon request. In-room massage services are available. Other features include blackout drapes/curtains, low-height electrical outlets in the bathroom, and the room is pet-friendly. Connecting/adjoining rooms are available upon request and subject to availability. Non-smoking.

roomType.name: Suite

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This suite features a living room, a separate bedroom, and a bathroom with a bath and free toiletries. It includes tiled floors, a seating area with a flat-screen TV with cable channels, air conditioning, a minibar, and a coffee machine. The unit has 1 bed.

roomType.name: JUNIOR SUITE, TERRACE
roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned suite features a furnished patio and a seating area. It offers free WiFi, a 55-inch LCD TV with digital channels and Netflix, and a minibar stocked with some free items, as well as complimentary bottled water and 24-hour room service. The bedroom includes a pillowtop bed with Egyptian cotton linens, a down duvet, blackout drapes/curtains, and turndown service. The bathroom has a deep soaking bathtub, a separate shower with a rainfall showerhead, and includes a safe, free newspaper, and laptop workspace. In-room massage is available. Other amenities include a wardrobe, a safe deposit box, daily housekeeping, and heating. Connecting/adjoining rooms are available upon request.

roomType.name: DELUXE

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This spacious, air-conditioned double room features a seating area, minibar, wardrobe, and a flat-screen TV with cable channels. The private bathroom includes a bath, shower, bidet, free toiletries, and bathrobes. The unit has 1 bed.

roomType.name: ROOM, TERRACE
roomType.roomDescription: This spacious, individually decorated room features a king-size bed with a pillowtop mattress, Egyptian cotton linens, and a down duvet. It includes a furnished patio, a seating area, a desk, and a 55-inch LCD TV with digital channels and Netflix. Guests can enjoy free WiFi, a mini-fridge, a minibar with some complimentary items, 24-hour room service, and free bottled water. The private bathroom offers a deep soaking bathtub, a separate shower with a rainfall showerhead, and includes turndown service. Additional amenities include air conditioning, heating, a safe, a free newspaper, a laptop workspace, and blackout drapes/curtains. In-room massage is available. Free rollaway/extra beds and cribs/infant beds are available upon request. The room is non-smoking and pet-friendly, with daily housekeeping. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability. Accessible features include closed-captioned TV.

roomType.name: SUITE, TERRACE
roomType.roomDescription: This individually decorated, non-smoking room offers a furnished patio and a separate sitting area. It features a king-size pillowtop bed with Egyptian cotton linens and a down duvet. The bathroom includes a deep soaking bathtub, a separate shower with a rainfall showerhead, and free toiletries. Amenities include free WiFi, a 55-inch LCD TV with digital channels and Netflix, a mini-fridge, a minibar with some free items, 24-hour room service, free bottled water, air conditioning, heating, a safe, a laptop workspace, and daily housekeeping. In-room massage is available. Free rollaway/extra beds and cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability. Accessibility features include closed-captioned TV.

roomType.name: ROOM, BALCONY
roomType.roomDescription: This individually decorated, pet-friendly room offers a furnished balcony, complimentary WiFi, and a 55-inch LCD TV with digital channels and Netflix. It features a pillowtop bed with Egyptian cotton linens and a down duvet, blackout drapes, and turndown service. The private bathroom includes a deep soaking bathtub and a separate shower with a rainfall showerhead. A mini-fridge, minibar (stocked with some free items), free bottled water, and 24-hour room service are provided. Additional amenities include air conditioning, heating, a safe, a laptop workspace, a free newspaper, and daily housekeeping. In-room massage is available. Free rollaway/extra beds and cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability. Accessibility features include closed-captioned TV.

roomType.name: SUPERIOR
roomType.roomDescription: This 435-square-foot, non-smoking, pet-friendly room features a king-size pillowtop bed with Egyptian cotton linens, a down duvet, and turndown service. Guests can enjoy entertainment options including a 55-inch LCD TV with digital channels and Netflix, and an iPod docking station. The room also offers free WiFi, a minibar (stocked with some free items), a mini-fridge, 24-hour room service, and complimentary bottled water. The private bathroom includes a deep soaking bathtub and a separate shower with a rainfall showerhead. Additional amenities include air conditioning, heating, a safe, a laptop workspace, a free newspaper, and daily housekeeping. Free rollaway/extra beds and cribs/infant beds are available upon request. For accessibility, the TV has closed captioning. In-room massage is available. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability.

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles, the Aiden Los Angeles Downtown Dragon Gate Inn is near the Metro station with access to the Rose Bowl and Rose Parade. It offers complimentary Wi-Fi, and a complimentary buffet breakfast. The hotel features a fitness center, gift shops/newsstands, a hair salon, and a television in a common area. Guests can enjoy a meal at the on-site restaurant or coffee shop/cafe. Featured amenities include a 24-hour business center, express check-in, and express check-out. The air-conditioned rooms include refrigerators, flat-screen televisions with cable programming, desks, and coffee/tea makers. Housekeeping is provided daily. Parking is available (fees apply). Nearby attractions include Los Angeles State Historic Park and Dodger Stadium.

description2.language: The Aiden Los Angeles Downtown Dragon Gate Inn is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are easily accessible by taxi or bus from the hotel.

hotel.hotelName: Aiden Los Angeles Downtown Dragon Gate Inn

roomType.roomDescription: The double room includes a tea and coffee maker and one bed.

roomType.name: STANDARD, KING BED, ACCESSIBLE
roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking room features a king bed, free WiFi and wired internet access, and a 42-inch flat-screen TV with premium channels. It also includes a refrigerator, coffee/tea maker, air conditioning, desk, iron/ironing board, and daily housekeeping. The partially open bathroom provides a hair dryer and towels. Connecting/adjoining rooms are available upon request.

roomType.name: ROOM, KING BED

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned room features heating, a tea and coffee maker, and a TV with cable channels. The unit offers 1 bed.

roomType.name: SUITE, KING BED, BATH AND SHOWER, ACCESSIBLE
SUITE, KING BED, ACCESSIBLE
roomType.roomDescription: This air-conditioned suite features a king bed, free WiFi and wired internet access, and a 42-inch flat-screen TV with premium channels. A refrigerator, coffee/tea maker, desk, and iron/ironing board are provided. The partially open bathroom includes a hair dryer and towels. Daily housekeeping is included. Non-smoking. Connecting/adjoining rooms are available upon request.

description1.language: Mama Shelter LA Hollywood is a hotel located in Hollywood, offering a rooftop, bar, and restaurant. Free WiFi is available throughout the property. Air-conditioned rooms feature a flat-screen TV, DVD player, mini refrigerator, work desk, and a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hairdryer. A gift shop and private parking are available. The Capitol Records Building is 600 metres away, Dolby Theater is 800 metres away, and the Hollywood Bowl is 1.6 km away. Bob Hope Airport is 11 km from the property.

description2.language: The Mama Shelter Los Angeles Hollywood is a hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

roomType.name: room, 1 king bed, city view (large mama), 1 king bed

description1.language: Americas Best Value Inn And Suites Downtown S.W. is located in the LAX – Los Angeles International Airport area and offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms and public areas. The hotel provides facilities for disabled guests, a car park, and meeting facilities. Guestrooms feature television LCD/plasma screen, internet access – wireless, non smoking rooms, and air conditioning.

description2.language: The Americas Best Value Inn & Suites Los Angeles Downtown SW is a hotel.

hotel.hotelName: Americas Best Value Inn & Suites Los Angeles Downtown SW
